data.body: On April 9, ARTSCCC co-hosted the California Arts Council’s only Bay Area grant workshop at the Richmond Art Center! The packed house highlighted the strong demand for arts funding in Contra Costa County. Make sure to sign up for the ARTSCCC Newsletter to stay updated: eepurl.com/iI3b-k!
